PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?director ?name WHERE {
  ?film wdt:P179 wd:Q388659 ; wdt:P57 ?director ; wdt:P577 ?date .

}
ORDER BY ?date
LIMIT 4
